contact.headline: Let's keep in touch
contact.description: I'm always interested in hearing about new opportunities, collaborations, or just having a chat about technology and design. Feel free to reach out!

publications.text: Research papers, articles, and written work focused on design systems, accessibility, and modern web practice.

repo.text: A downloadable library of illustrations and visual assets collected in one place for quick browsing and reuse.

cv.text: An interactive timeline of work, education, and selected milestones, with the latest experience surfaced first.

contact.text: If you would like to collaborate, discuss an opportunity, or simply say hello, you can reach me through the links below.

paragraphs.text: I'm a passionate professional focused on creating accessible, pixel-perfect digital experiences. My work lies at the intersection of design and development.

Creating experiences that not only look great but are meticulously built for performance and usability has always been my goal. I believe that great software should feel invisible, seamlessly integrating into people's lives while solving real problems.
Currently, I'm working on innovative projects that push the boundaries of what's possible on the web. I specialize in building scalable applications that deliver exceptional user experiences.
In my spare time, I enjoy contributing to open-source projects, writing technical articles, and exploring new technologies. I believe in continuous learning and sharing knowledge with the community.

items.title: PostDoctoral Researcher
items.organization: Eawag, Dübendorf, Switzerland | Christoph Vorburger Lab.
items.description: Lead the research team working on the genomics of host-bacteria interactions in the aphid-hamiltonella model.
details: NGS, Genome assembly & annotation, Comparative genomics, Symbioses, Functional enrichment
Data science, Machine-Learning, Data visualisation, Scientific outreach
Developed an innovative interactive Next-based platform to visualise and better understand the biological meaning of a very large set of genomic data
Mentored junior students and collaborated with cross-functional researchers

items.title: PostDoctoral Researcher

items.description: Researching genomic basis of symbiosis in Lucinid clams
details: NGS, Genome assembly & annotation, Proteomics, Comparative genomics, Symbioses
Data science, Machine-Learning, Data visualisation, Scientific outreach
Mentored students and collaborated with international professionals

items.title: Freelance Illustrator
items.description: I have always worked on the side as a freelance illustrator. My works have been exhibited in Milan, Amsterdam, London and Tokyo.
details: Taking commissions such as logos or scientific illustrations for manuscripts and journal covers
I have taken part in many different Art fairs, Illustration festivals all over Europe
I was part of a collective of artists in Milan  with whom I organised many events including exhibitions and live paintings
Member of the creative directors of the "Collirio" magazine
